key_insights: Why it matters: This move underscores Anthropic's ambition to expand its computational capabilities and strengthen its position in the AI market, particularly in the realm of large language models.
What changed: Anthropic has temporarily restricted access to its premium Claude model, which is a key component of its AI platform.
What to watch: The company's next steps in securing a deal with Meta will be closely monitored, as this could have a substantial impact on the future of AI development and deployment.

sources.title: Anthropic limits premium Claude access while eyeing Meta compute deal

cards.summary: Anthropic has announced a temporary reduction in the availability of its premium Claude model, which is a significant step in the company's strategic shift towards securing a major deal with Meta.
